title: Pasania variabilis
intro: Pasania variabilis is a plant species within the family Lauraceae, commonly known as a type of evergreen tree native to Southeast Asia. The health benefits of Pasania variabilis include its potential to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its use in traditional medicine for various ailments. The bioactive constituents of Pasania variabilis include sesquiterpenes, flavonoids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its pharmacological activities. In herbal medicine, Pasania variabilis is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and extracts, which are traditionally used to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
